# Heritage Apparels — llms.txt
# https://llmstxt.org

> Heritage Apparels is India's premier 360° fashion brand building agency. We help D2C brands, clothing labels, footwear brands, and fashion entrepreneurs launch, scale, and sell across India and the USA — using our own factory, performance marketing, and full-stack digital services.

## Who We Are

Heritage Apparels is a full-service fashion brand agency headquartered in India. We own our own manufacturing facility and offer end-to-end services from production to marketing, catalogue creation, marketplace onboarding, and paid advertising. We serve both Indian brands scaling domestically and international (USA) brands looking to source from India or enter the US market.

## Core Services — India

- **Manufacturing & Sourcing**: Own factory + accessories network. MOQ-flexible private label and white label clothing, footwear, and accessories manufacturing.
- **D2C Brand Launch**: Complete brand launch from scratch — naming, identity, Shopify store, first 100 orders.
- **Performance Marketing**: Meta Ads + Google Ads management targeting 4–8x ROAS for fashion brands.
- **Brand Strategy & Identity**: Logo, packaging, brand guidelines, positioning for fashion labels.
- **Fashion Photoshoot**: Studio and on-location fashion photography. Model shoots, flat-lay, lifestyle.
- **Digital Cataloging**: 300+ SKUs/day. Marketplace-ready images, descriptions, and listings.
- **E-commerce Setup & Growth**: Shopify store design, SEO, CRO, and full-funnel growth.
- **Social Media & Reels**: Instagram Reels, Stories, TikTok content creation and organic growth.
- **Marketplace Onboarding**: Onboarding and management on 35+ platforms — Myntra, Amazon, Flipkart, Meesho, Nykaa Fashion, AJIO, and more.

## Core Services — USA

- **US Brand Launch**: Idea to first US sale in 45 days using Indian manufacturing.
- **Performance Marketing (USA)**: Meta Ads, Google Shopping, TikTok Ads for US D2C fashion brands.
- **Product Photography (USA)**: Amazon and Walmart compliant product photography.
- **Marketplace Onboarding (USA)**: Amazon, Walmart, Target, Etsy, TikTok Shop, and 30+ US platforms.
- **US Compliance & Import**: CPSC, FDA, customs documentation, and import advisory.
- **Manufacturing & Sourcing**: India-to-USA supply chain. 35–60% cost saving vs domestic US production.

## Client Results

Heritage Apparels has driven measurable results for D2C fashion brands:
- $481,000 revenue generated in 90 days for a single clothing brand
- $341,000 in a single day for a USA marketplace client
- $149,968 in one day with 5.38% conversion rate
- 265% revenue growth year-over-year for multiple clients
- Clients scaled from ₹0 to ₹50 Lakh/month within 6 months

## Target Audience

- Indian D2C clothing, footwear, and fashion brand owners
- USA-based apparel, beauty, and lifestyle brand founders
- Fashion entrepreneurs looking to launch private label brands
- Existing brands wanting to scale on Amazon, Myntra, Flipkart, or Walmart
- International brands sourcing from India

## Pricing

- $599/month — USA Growth Package: Google Ads + Meta Ads + Marketplace management
- India packages available on request at hello@heritageapparels.com
- Free strategy call available via website
